queue_item.action: Integrate the digest-bound queue-update manifest with queue materialization so exact update bytes and event orders are verified before state reconstruction.

progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed against byte-equivalent committed source and dependency behavior.
progress.authority_boundary: authoritative=true is emitted only when the manifest is self-consistent, exact supplied bytes and event orders match, and the manifest carries a structurally complete tree-bound enumeration whose count agrees.
progress.privacy_boundary: Public repository paths, hashes, commit identifiers, queue metadata, and operational claim states only.

queue_item.handoff: Add an independently produced Git tree enumeration attestation, bind its exact tree SHA and queue-update entry count into the manifest, then execute the manifest-bound materializer in repository CI against the exact commit.
